basic_details.job_title: DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Nagapattinam (DCPU Nagapattinam) has published the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) Notification 2026 to fill 1 vacancy on a contract basis. Candidates with a maximum age of 42 years and holding the prescribed Master's degree or Bachelor's degree with the required work experience are eligible to apply offline. The application process is open until 07-08-2026, and candidates can access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Social Resource Management OR Bachelor's degree.
qualification.details: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Social Resource Management. OR Bachelor's degree with two years of work experience in Project Formulation / Social Welfare / Women and Child Development activities, monitoring, supervision. Computer knowledge is required.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 27,804/- per month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nagapattinam.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Social Resource Management. OR Bachelor's degree with two years of work experience in Project Formulation / Social Welfare / Women and Child Development activities, monitoring, supervision. Computer knowledge is required.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nagapattinam.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) recruitment is 07-08-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Social Work, Sociology, Child Development, Human Rights, Public Administration, Psychology, Mental Health, Law, Public Health, or Social Resource Management. Alternatively, a Bachelor's degree with two years of relevant work experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post is 42 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,804/- per month for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DCPU Nagapattinam Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You can download the application form from the official website www.nagapattinam.nic.in or obtain it in person from the District Children Protection Office.

faq.question: Q6. Where should I send the completed application form?
faq.answer: Completed applications should be sent to the District Children Protection Officer, District Children Protection Office, Room No. 209, Second Floor, District Collectorate Office, Nagapattinam - 611003.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) in the District Child Protection Unit Nagapattinam.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) role.

faq.question: Q10. Does the recruitment require computer knowledge?
faq.answer: Yes, computer knowledge is a mandatory requirement for candidates applying for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post. This is essential for performing various job duties effectively.
